title: LangChain credential middleware with automatic scope-gated tool access

artifacts.description: LangChain CallbackHandler that intercepts onToolStart events, validates cached AgentPolicy proof against required permission bitmask, and blocks execution if scope is insufficient
BaseTool wrapper factory that decorates any LangChain tool with scope annotation and delegates enforcement to BolyraCallbackHandler
Default tool-name to permission bitmask mapping (SQLDatabaseTool → READ_DATA, StripeChargeTool → FINANCIAL_SMALL, etc.) with merge support for user-supplied overrides
In-memory LRU cache keyed by sessionNonce that stores proveHandshake() results and evicts on nonce expiry
Public barrel export: BolyraCallbackHandler, wrapTools(), loadToolPermissionConfig()
JSON Schema (expressed in YAML) for the declarative tool→bitmask config file; validated at middleware init
Reference YAML config mapping common LangChain community tools to Bolyra permission bits
Python port: BaseCallbackHandler subclass + wrap_tools() helper; proving delegates to @bolyra/sdk subprocess bridge
Unit tests: proof cache hit/miss, scope gate blocks under-privileged calls, YAML config loading, nonce expiry eviction
Integration test: full AgentExecutor run with mock LLM, real proveHandshake() (fast/mock proof), verifies blocked vs allowed tool paths
Python equivalent integration test using pytest and langchain-community stubs
5-line quickstart wrapping an existing AgentExecutor, YAML config reference, permission bit table, nonce lifetime notes
npm publish (@bolyra/langchain) and PyPI publish (bolyra-langchain) runbook, peer dependency matrix, versioning policy

steps: Define tool-permissions.schema.yaml with ajv-compatible JSON Schema; list all 8 permission bit names as enum values
Implement toolPermissionMap.ts with hardcoded defaults for top-10 LangChain community tools and a mergePermissionConfig() that deep-merges user YAML
Implement ProofSessionCache.ts: Map<sessionNonce, {proof, expiresAt}>; add get/set/evict; wire eviction to AgentPolicy expiry field

Implement BolyraCallbackHandler.ts: onToolStart() resolves tool name → required bitmask via config, checks cache for valid proof, calls proveHandshake() on miss, throws BolyraInsufficientScopeError if proof bitmask & required !== required
Implement BolyraToolWrapper.ts: wrapTools(tools[], config) annotates each tool with requiredPermission metadata and returns tools unchanged (handler does enforcement — no monkey-patching call())
Wire index.ts barrel; add package.json for @bolyra/langchain with peerDeps on @bolyra/sdk ^0.2.0 and @langchain/core ^0.2.0
Write unit tests for cache logic, scope gate arithmetic, and YAML loading; mock proveHandshake()
Write integration test: construct AgentExecutor with BolyraCallbackHandler, run agent with mock LLM that forces a FINANCIAL_SMALL tool call, assert blocked when credential has only READ_DATA
Port to Python: implement bolyra_langchain/handler.py as BaseCallbackHandler, delegate proof to subprocess bridge (same pattern as sdk-python), publish bolyra-langchain to PyPI
Write Python pytest integration test mirroring the TS integration test
Draft README.md with 5-line quickstart, full YAML config reference, and security notes on nonce lifetime
Add @bolyra/langchain to root package.json workspaces; update landing page ecosystem section
